vectors.note: Schema-maximum accepted snapshot used for size, depth, Bridge, and byte-stability gates.
Saved catalog semantics remain authoritative after an embedded catalog price changes.
Closed top-level object rejects an unknown property.
HTML-bearing state is rejected before mutation.
Adapter 8 KiB budget rejects an oversized snapshot.
Bounded semantic text rejects an overlong hero name.
Tasks must be the exact five-record tuple.
Town numbers must be a permutation of 1 through 4.
Every town coordinate must be inside the declared grid.
Path speed must be strictly lower than road speed.
Catalog index, id, and variant key must be structurally coherent.
Generated selection requires scenario id gen.
